title: Cannot add subcolumn with parallel replicas
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
With `test_cluster_one_shard_two_replicas` cluster from testing run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Nullable(Int)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
SELECT tx.c0.null FROM t0 tx GLOBAL RIGHT JOIN t0 AS ty ON tx.c0 = ty.c0 SETTINGS allow_experimental_parallel_reading_from_replicas = 1, cluster_for_parallel_replicas = 'test_cluster_one_shard_two_replicas';
/*
DB::Exception: Cannot add subcolumn c0.null: column with this name already exists. (ILLEGAL_COLUMN)
*/
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> TCPHandler: Code: 44. DB::Exception: Cannot add subcolumn c0.null: column with this name already exists. (ILLEGAL_COLUMN), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):

1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:116: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x000000001409c1a6
2. src/Common/Exception.h:119: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000cd915ac
3. src/Common/Exception.h:137: DB::Exception::Exception<String&>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String&>::type>, String&) @ 0x000000000cda8b76

5. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x0000000019f56133
6. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x0000000019ff3b48
7. src/DataTypes/IDataType.cpp:133: DB::IDataType::forEachSubcolumn(std::function<void (DB::ISerialization::SubstreamPath const&, String const&, DB::ISerialization::SubstreamData const&)> const&, DB::ISerialization::SubstreamData const&) @ 0x0000000019f50a9f
8. src/Storages/ColumnsDescription.cpp:927: DB::ColumnsDescription::addSubcolumns(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IDataType const> const&) @ 0x000000001d7a18c8
9. src/Storages/ColumnsDescription.cpp:334: DB::ColumnsDescription::add(DB::ColumnDescription, String const&, bool, bool) @ 0x000000001d7a08bf
10. src/Storages/ColumnsDescription.cpp:250: DB::ColumnsDescription::ColumnsDescription(DB::NamesAndTypesList) @ 0x000000001d7a0d64
11. src/Storages/buildQueryTreeForShard.cpp:300: DB::(anonymous namespace)::executeSubqueryNode(std::shared_ptr<DB::IQueryTreeNode> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>&, unsigned long) @ 0x000000001db487e5
12. src/Storages/buildQueryTreeForShard.cpp:399: DB::buildQueryTreeForShard(std::shared_ptr<DB::PlannerContext> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IQueryTreeNode>, bool) @ 0x000000001db4595d
13. src/Interpreters/ClusterProxy/executeQuery.cpp:769: DB::ClusterProxy::executeQueryWithParallelReplicas(DB::QueryPlan&, DB::StorageID const&, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::shared_ptr<DB::IQueryTreeNode> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::PlannerContext> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::shared_ptr<std::list<DB::StorageLimits, std::allocator<DB::StorageLimits>> const>, std::unique_ptr<DB::IQueryPlanStep, std::default_delete<DB::IQueryPlanStep>>) @ 0x000000001d2a3d8e

16. src/Planner/Planner.cpp:1631: DB::Planner::buildPlanForQueryNode() @ 0x000000001a6db407
17. src/Planner/Planner.cpp:1402: DB::Planner::buildQueryPlanIfNeeded() @ 0x000000001a6d8053
18. src/Interpreters/InterpreterSelectQueryAnalyzer.cpp:269: DB::InterpreterSelectQueryAnalyzer::getQueryPlan() @ 0x000000001b012ccd
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 INT, c3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 10, 3.14);
CREATE TABLE t2 (c4 INT, c5 DATE);
SELECT tx.c1, ty.c4 FROM t1 AS tx LEFT JOIN t2 AS ty ON tx.c2 = ty.c4 WHERE tx.c3 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Adding subcolumn with parallel replicas causes column name conflict
